title: hedysarum fruticosum subsp. lignosum
intro: Hedysarum fruticosum subsp. lignosum, also known as the tree Hedysarum, is a subspecies of the Hedysarum fruticosum plant, which is a perennial legume native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia and parts of the Himalayas. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health due to its high content of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Hedysarum fruticosum subsp. lignosum include its potential to aid in the management of diabetes, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as an infusion, tincture, or dried extract, and is used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
